title: Conversation using all four provenance values

messages.content: You are a software architect assistant. The user is working in a Node.js monorepo.
How should I structure shared utilities in a monorepo?

Based on your existing structure, you already have a packages/shared directory. Place all cross-package utilities there — date formatting, validation, logging — and have each package import from @your-org/shared. Use TypeScript project references for clean build ordering.
